title: Kordisen Sauce Pan Set with Lid, 16cm+20cm Non Stick Small Pot with Granite Coating, 2-Piece Cookware Set, PFOA/PFOS Free
features: 【Non-Stick Technology】: Enjoy effortless cooking with our sauce pan featuring advanced non-stick technology; say goodbye to stubborn food residue sticking to the bottom; makes both cooking and cleaning experiences a breeze

【Safe and Harmless Materials】: Crafted with care, our small pot is made from safe and harmless materials; free from harmful substances like PFOA and PFOS; ensures a healthy cooking experience for you and your family

【Universal Stovetop Compatibility】: Designed for versatility, this cooking pot is compatible with various stovetops, including gas, electric, ceramic hobs, and induction; enjoy the flexibility of using it on different cooking surfaces
【Inner Spout Design】: Featuring an innovative inner spout design; locks in heat for faster cooking; makes pouring liquids like water or soup convenient and spill-free

【Ergonomic Design】: Our sauce pot is ergonomically designed for a comfortable grip; the handle makes pouring easy and reduces the risk of spills; the lid is thoughtfully designed with a storage feature for placing a spatula or ladle, enhancing convenience while cooking
description: Product Description Elegant Cooking Companion Elevate your cooking experience with our non-stick saucepan, crafted with quality materials for safe and healthy cooking. The convenient pouring lip adds a touch of sophistication to your kitchen, making every meal a delight to prepare. Previous page Next page 1 Easy to Clean 2 With Pouring Lip 3 Non-Stick High-Quality Silicone Spatula Crafted with top-grade silicone, heat-resistant and non-deforming, safeguarding pots from scratches. Versatile Knob Design The pot's knob is designed to hold kitchen utensils, adding convenience to your cooking experience. Induction Base: Even Heating Experience rapid and uniform heat distribution for efficient cooking with our induction base, ensuring consistent and delightful results every time. Ergonomic Wood-Grain Handle Ergonomically designed wood-grain handle provides a comfortable grip, heat-resistant, enhancing your cooking experience with ease. Comparison Sauce Pan Set Add To Basket Nonstick Wok Add To Basket Nonstick Grilling Pan Add To Basket Deep Frying Pan Add To Basket Skillet Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 815 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,295 4.5 out of 5 stars 767 4.5 out of 5 stars 638 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,510 Price £39.99 £ 39 . 99 £35.99 £ 35 . 99 £19.43 £ 19 . 43 £38.99 £ 38 . 99 £26.34 £ 26 . 34 Material Aluminum Aluminum Aluminum Aluminum Aluminum Dimension 16cm+20cm 12inch 9.5/11inch 11inch 10/11/12inch Easy to Clean ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Has Coating ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Detachable Handle ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Are the saucepans compatible with induction cooktops? Yes, both the 1.5QT and 2.5QT saucepans are compatible with all cooktops, including gas, electric, ceramic, and induction. Can I use metal utensils with these saucepans? It is recommended to use silicone, nylon, or wooden utensils with these saucepans to avoid scratching the non-stick surface and prolong their lifespan. Metal utensils may cause damage to the coating over time. How durable are the non-stick coatings on these saucepans? The non-stick coatings on our saucepans are designed to withstand regular use and provide long-lasting performance. However, it is essential to use gentle utensils and avoid metal utensils to prevent scratching and preserve the non-stick properties. What is the material used for the handles of these saucepans? Our saucepans feature heat-resistant handles, including ergonomic wooden handles, ensuring comfortable and safe handling during cooking. Do these saucepans come with lids? Yes, both the 1.5QT and 2.5QT saucepans are equipped with matching lids to help retain heat and moisture during cooking. The lids are designed to fit securely on the saucepans, ensuring efficient cooking results.
